docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VOIGNIER, NATALIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SEBASTIAN IBLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATALIE VOIGNIER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT VOIGNIER, NATALIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBLER, SEBASTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOIGNIER, NATALIE $465.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00, NO EXHIBITS FILED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBLER, SEBASTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT VOIGNIER, NATALIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
